arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid make decision on January pursuit of Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Real Madrid have made a decision regarding their transfer pursuit of Liverpool and England defender Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold has already told Liverpool his plan amid fresh Real Madrid transfer claim
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been linked with a move to Real Madrid from Liverpool

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe sends transfer warning to Newcastle owners ahead of January
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe has warned the club’s owners that the squad is in danger of becoming stale ahead of the January transfer window. The Magpies have spent over half a billion pounds on players since Saudi-Arabia’s Public Investment Fund took over the club in 2021, but have kept their powder dry in the […] The post Eddie Howe sends transfer warning to Newcastle owners ahead of January first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe to receive major Newcastle boost as PIF make investment decision
arts.sum: The current Newcastle squad and their manager Eddie Howe are set to receive a huge boost ahead of the 2025/26 campaign as the Premier League club’s owners have decided to upgrade the Magpies’ training ground. The Tyneside club have been looking to close the gap to the Premier League’s “Big Six” ever since the Public […] The post Eddie Howe to receive major Newcastle boost as PIF make investment decision appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'yet to make breakthrough' in contract negotiations with star player
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly yet to make a breakthrough in their efforts to agree a new contract with Real Madrid target Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Liverpool learn Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer 'decision' as Real Madrid 'deliver' January verdict
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold leaving Liverpool during the January transfer window is the only way the Reds will receive a fee should their vice-captain not sign a contract extension

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer preference crystal clear
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is one of three Liverpool players who are are set to leave on a free transfer as things stand along with Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk - and Real Madrid are hoping to snap him up

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola drops hint he'll stick with major Man City change despite Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Stefan Ortega came in for Ederson against Liverpol after the Brazilian made an error in Manchester City's 3-3 draw against Feyenoord, with Pep Guardiola opting to make a change amid their torrid run of form

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s Chiesa nears return at crucial moment
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa's Liverpool adventure has barely begun, with only three appearances totaling 78 minutes, including a mere one-minute Champions League debut against Milan. The post Liverpool’s Chiesa nears return at crucial moment appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sold me for £3.3m and now I’m keeping up with Bukayo Saka in assists
